The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

programme.title: E1 - Climate Change And Mining
programme.desc: Simultaneously linked to Yukon's history and essential to its economy, how is the mining industry being affected by climate warming, and above all, what is it doing to be part of the solution?

programme.title: E98
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E34 - In Selestat (4)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Selestat, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in gingerbread and in the region's castles.

programme.title: E1 - Spring As The Water Flows
programme.desc: Spring has arrived in the Trois-Lacs-Jura region, and life returns to Lake Morat, Lake Neuchatel and Lake Bienne. We meet Patrick, aboard the ''Romandie I''. In the Bernese Oberland, between the alpine lakes of Brienz and Thoune, Interlaken welcomes its tourists.

programme.title: E5 - A Pangolin's Plight
programme.desc: Feel heartbreak when Dr. Amanda’s team loses a pangolin abused by wildlife traffickers, but cheer when another is released post-rehab. Check on a trio of hedgehogs and tag along as the center’s baboons and nyala antelopes get a change of scenery.

programme.title: E6 - Crocodile Capers
programme.desc: Strap in for Dr. Amanda’s risky attempt to collar a wild roan antelope. Later, chase down blue monkey Indigo while unrest ensues among the vervets. Examine an eagle owl with bumblefoot and say adieu to Sheila the croc, who’s headed back to the wild.

programme.title: E1 - The Young Up-Start
programme.desc: Explore the lush treed cityscape where fluffy male Matnoor rules over the 30-member-strong Street Troop with an iron fist. Then meet Aarav, the old alpha who oversees the wilder Hill Troop. Which will up-and-comer Loci challenge for the crown?

programme.title: E2 - The Grass is Greener
programme.desc: Go on a junk-food-fuelled urban holiday with the Street Troop, then watch the Hill Troop’s invasion of their turf turn sour. Monitor the Sisterhood’s plot to kidnap Sara’s baby before newly minted alpha Loci discovers his old rival is back in town.

programme.title: E5 - Lion Daycare
programme.desc: Discover why it takes a village to raise lion cubs in Kenya and sniff out the mating strategy of fragrant lemurs in Madagascar. Cut a rug at a honeybee dance party, then listen up as a forked-tailed drongo tricks other birds out of their dinner.

programme.title: E7 - Madagascar: Lizards and Lemurs
programme.desc: Meet the unique primates and reptiles searching for water and dodging predators, from ring-tailed lemurs in the east coast rainforests to tiny brown leaf chameleons, in this land of extreme climate variations and habitats.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Join anthropologist Jill Pruetz and guide Dondo (Johnny) Kanté and watch evolution happen in real time. Meet the elusive chimps of Fongoli, Senegal, who use tools, interact with fire, and adapt to the human world as it collides with their own.

programme.title: Baboons: Rules of the Troop
programme.desc: Follow four families of four different species - the resourceful Beach Troop, the warlike Desert Troop, the disciplined River Troop, and the peaceful Mountain Band - to find out why these primates are among the most successful animals in Africa.

programme.title: E2 - Little Problems, Big Adventures!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle are turning little problems into big adventures! When Mr. Vanderboos accidentally sprays hair growth serum on Daddy, Officer Freeze mistakes him for a hairy monster, & a wild chase begins! Then, Mila has a bad cold, but she still has to help Morphle figure out the right morphs to rescue a dog stuck in a tree. From playing a quiet game to avoid waking a napping neighbor to playing hide & seek with friends, every little problem is a big adventure!

programme.title: E1 - Our Favorite Family Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Buster on his favorite family adventures! When Mummy has to dash off to work, Buster & Grandpa have to make dinner together. They follow a recipe & it creates a big mess, but it's still tasty! The adventures continue as Buster & Daddy spend the day together, playing soccer & chasing a runaway kite! Plus, the whole family goes on an outdoor camping trip where a runaway tent causes chaos through the campsite.

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Rescue Missions!
programme.desc: Join Gecko for some of his ultimate rescue missions! Blue must face his fear of a storm to save Eric the Excavator, who is stuck in a trench with a dam about to overflow! Then, Weasel fits Vicky the Ice Cream truck with a super-fast rocket, causing her to speed out of control! Gecko & the Mechanicals must stop her before she crashes. From saving a trapped Mummy Truck to rescuing the Mechs, it's always a big adventure!

programme.title: E10 - Mindful Bedtime Lullabies
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E6 - Twinkle's Colour Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E5 - An Adventure, Pedals, Rescue & Stars!
programme.desc: Join the Minibods for an adventure with pedals, rescues & stars! Lulu goes camping but realizes she's left her favorite Binky Bunny behind & has to learn how to cope. Then, Newt goes on an adventure to find a real-life Flutterbug, but she has to be brave when her bike's stabilizers come off! The adventures continue as Jeff overcomes his fear of mud to rescue his feather duster & Bubbles builds a rocket to try & reach a big purple star in the sky!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Day on the Farm!
programme.desc: Join Ella for a super fun day at Lellobee City Farm! First, when a nest of baby duck eggs starts to hatch, Ella has to play 'Mummy Duck' to keep all the cute but runaway ducklings together! Then, Rishi organizes all the animals for a friendly game of soccer, where everyone learns each other's animal sounds. The fun day ends with a new arrival, as Ella & Mei find & adopt a stray cat named Bingo, welcoming him to his new home!

programme.title: E1 - Our Favorite Family Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Buster on his favorite family adventures! When Mummy has to dash off to work, Buster & Grandpa have to make dinner together. They follow a recipe & it creates a big mess, but it's still tasty! The adventures continue as Buster & Daddy spend the day together, playing soccer & chasing a runaway kite! Plus, the whole family goes on an outdoor camping trip where a runaway tent causes chaos through the campsite.

programme.title: E5 - A Super Creative Day of Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super creative day of play with Twinkle! First, it's time to get musical! Each toadstool makes a different musical note, allowing Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to create a musical tune. Then, get creative as Twinkle has fun painting a picture of what she sees. The fun continues as Twinkle shares a box full of super fun toys, & her friends learn how to play new musical instruments!

programme.title: E27 - Can-Bots
programme.desc: Stanley is very busy, so he invents three little robots called the Can Bots to help. They begin well but soon start getting out of hand. Stanley has some reprogramming to do.

programme.title: E38 - It's Time To Braid Hair
programme.desc: At the salon, JoJo sees a picture of a girl with hair braids - time for a Gran Gran plan.

programme.title: E37 - The Decider
programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.title: E38 - Cubby
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: E39 - Exercise
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: E43 - The Looking After Badge
programme.desc: Outside the clubhouse a large crowd has gathered around a hot air balloon with whisperings that someone is going on an adventure!

programme.title: E5 - The Continent Of Europe
programme.desc: The Go Jetters help Grandmaster Glitch take his own souvenir selfies across Europe.

programme.title: E42 - Broccoli Alone
programme.desc: Supertato is out chasing a milkshake robot and leaves Broccoli in charge of Tato Tower. Evil Pea tries to take over the tower, but Broccoli puts on a great defence.

programme.title: E18 - Plane
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'plane' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We explore a flying plane, a landing plane, a fast plane and even meeting a sneezing plane!

programme.title: E8 - Messy Needs A Fur-Cut
programme.desc: When Messy accidentally sets Farmer Fuddle's sheep loose, he must help round them up in time for their annual wool shearing. But will Messy be brave enough to get a fur cut of his own?

programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: E7 - Unicorse
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: E28 - Andy And The Sooty Tern
programme.desc: Andy heads to the Galapagos Islands in search of a seabird called a sooty tern. Along the way, he meets a fish called a trevally that leaps out of the water trying to catch birds.

programme.title: E16 - The Medicine Badge
programme.desc: Duggee's not very well, he's lost his voice. The Squirrels want to make him feel better. Duggee tries to tell them that he needs some water but the Squirrels don't quite understand, so they ask all the other animals for advice. Does anyone have the answer?

programme.desc: Duggee's not very well, he's lost his voice. The Squirrels want to make him feel better. Duggee tries to tell them that he needs some water but the Squirrels don't quite understand, so they ask all the other animals for advice. Does anyone have the answer?

programme.title: E29 - Mermaid
programme.desc: Fifi asks Stanley to help them find a Mermaid so they can take its picture for school. They explore the ocean floor in their search where they encounter lots of ocean creatures.

programme.title: E39 - Exercise
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: E44 - The Comedy Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels go to see what Duggee is doing but on the way Tag stumbles on some toy blocks and hurts his knee. How can they make him feel better? Happy's mum says laughter is the best medicine.

programme.title: E43 - Pea Repeats
programme.desc: Supertato is due to receive the Best Hero Award, but Evil Pea decides she should get it. Carrot tells her she needs to defeat herself to win the award.

programme.title: E42 - Show And Tell
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Verified Live
programme.desc: Matthew Amroliwala presents all the latest global and UK news, live from London.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... A Fire Engine
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Fire Engine. It's his first day on the job and he's a little nervous when he gets a call about a cat stuck up a tree.

programme.title: Micro Mycology
programme.desc: How to make ice cream without a freezer? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of organic chemistry. Have hands-on fun by making your own ice cream, and get to know Gloria Lim, who studied fungi, their use to humans, and their role in decomposition.

programme.title: Andrew Basso: Enthralling Escapologist
programme.desc: Andrew Basso is an escapologist performer who holds the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the fastest time to escape from a water tank upside down with restrained hands and feet. Learn how he copes with fear during his performances and what happens when they go wrong.

programme.title: The Maze
programme.desc: The Nektons find a mysterious underwater maze. When they enter it, they get trapped inside. And what's worse - they're not alone!

programme.title: Critical Examination
programme.desc: Robyn and Nyatepe help transfer a sick lion into a mobile high-tech scanner unit for a critical examination. Josh and Molly are checking the competitors in a posh horse trial for signs of injury and illness. And Jamie and Bonte are helping with Leo's leg surgery.

programme.title: Sheepy Gets a Haircut
programme.desc: When a friendly sheep turns up in Kiwifruit Valley, Darwin and Newts have to figure out what to do about her very woolly coat.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Ice hockey brothers Rais and Aren are off to Canada for the trip of a lifetime, as Aren has a tournament and is hoping to make his family proud. And Ella and Asiyah are showing us just what determined young skaters they are.

programme.title: Anysberg - Hidden Gem Of The Klein Karoo
programme.desc: The team visits Anysberg, an island mountain in the Karoo Desert. They find a cave with mysterious rock art that provides a glimpse into the past, and they discover how Nature can recover when given a chance.

programme.title: Clownfish and White Tiger
programme.desc: We follow the aquarium team as they initiate their very own breeding program with the hope of finding many more clownfish to come. In the meantime, Lin Mao, the white tiger, has something wrong with his hip and the vets need to make a diagnosis.

programme.title: Trip to Serbia
programme.desc: Milo is thrilled to find a four-leaf clover and shows it to Alim, who eats it! Upset, Zoe and Milo follow Alim to Serbia, where Nevana invites them to a party with sports. They learn that Serbia has other lucky charms beyond the four-leaf clover.

programme.title: Trip to Senegal
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo show up with one baguette instead of two. When Alim suggests they could have bargained, Zoe and Milo refuse-bargaining isn't an option! Alim takes them to Senegal, where along with chasing chickens on bikes, bargaining is considered an art.

programme.title: Trip to Iran
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo offer Alim a snack, but when he refuses, they eat it themselves. Alim protests-he was just being polite! To explain, Alim takes them to Iran to meet Aydin during Nowruz, where they learn about Ta'arof, the custom of refusing three times before accepting.

programme.title: Flight of the Godwits
programme.desc: When Newts needs instructions on how to film the godwits migrating, but Darwin is stuck in the treehouse, they build a series of listening mirrors to keep in communication.

programme.title: Marvellous Medicine and First Aid
programme.desc: What's the best way to organise a first aid kit? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of medicine. Have hands-on fun by making a handy first aid kit, and get to know Al-Zahrawi, ‘the father of surgery' & inventor of a number of surgical instruments.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Mystery of the Reluctant Racer
programme.desc: Addison and Alex's record-setting soap box derby car seems like a shoe-in to win the annual race – until something or someone makes it mysteriously slow down to a crawl. Has it been sabotaged? Addison only has an hour till race time to solve the mystery!

programme.title: Hot Springs
programme.desc: Kit loses Mr. Battery in a hot spring.

programme.title: Trip to Turkey
programme.desc: Alim makes a mountain of cookies, explaining to a laughing Zoe and Milo that you must cook for neighbors too. To prove it, Alim takes them to Cappadocia, Turkey, where Zeynep shows them her village. They learn that sharing food with neighbors is a tradition.

programme.title: I'm Like a Bird
programme.desc: Tortoise's day turns silly when his shell gets a puncture and goes floppy! While trying to escape it, he knocks an egg from its nest. Determined to help, Tortoise sets off to return the egg-discovering his squishy shell can be surprisingly useful.

programme.title: Fun with Pressure and Hydraulics
programme.desc: How come does a lift operate as a hydraulic system? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of pressure. Have hands-on fun by experimenting with leakages, and get to know Blaise Pascal, a polymath, who pioneered research into the hydrostatic principle.

programme.title: Terry, The Firefighter Cat
programme.desc: Terry the pug, believing himself to be a cat, wants to become the firefighters' cat and does his very best in several situations to prove the firefighters he's brave. Will Terry succeed thanks to the Buffycats' help?

programme.title: Attack of the Shortbread Witch
programme.desc: Rose has handled giants, witches, and trolls, but now her mom is mad at her for secretly attending Fairy Tale Land school. Grounded, Rose must rescue Hawk, Astoria, and others, turned into biscuits by the Gingerbread Witch during cooking class.

programme.title: Hot Springs
programme.desc: Kit loses Mr. Battery in a hot spring.

programme.title: Naomi's Birthday
programme.desc: Naomi's birthday is coming, and she's planned it all-including the pricey gift her friends must buy. To afford it, Albert writes homework, Carol babysits, Flippy dances, and Robbie... borrows from Naomi! But will the gift-and the party-be all she hoped for?

programme.title: Spring into Action
programme.desc: Inspired by a sleepover at a friend's place, Darwin and Newts build a trampoline prototype before building a larger trampoline.

programme.title: Garden Snail
programme.desc: Fiona's art lesson with Orla and Meabh backfires when they get excited and run wild with the paint. Grandad helps Binah appreciate snails on a new level after introducing her to the hilarious world of snail racing.

programme.title: Space Rescues
programme.desc: Sending humans into space is always risky. Host Emily Calandrelli looks at a couple close calls on missions that have had to abort after launch, and examines steps being taken by NASA to prepare for the worst.

programme.title: ColourXplosion
programme.desc: Eric learns that if you want to create different paint colours, all you have to do is mix your paints. As long as you have the primary colours – red, blue, and yellow – you can create lots of new shades.

programme.title: No Sleeping in the Lab!
programme.desc: Dr Xand tries to sleep standing up, then finds out how virtual reality can help in surgery, before he and Dr Chris count down five things that make your skin crawl!

programme.title: Fighting to the Finish
programme.desc: Alannah and Morgan have a fight on their hands at their first-ever English Trampoline Championships, and Ekraj reluctantly reveals his new routines with some unexpected results.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Trip to Turkey
programme.desc: Alim makes a mountain of cookies, explaining to a laughing Zoe and Milo that you must cook for neighbors too. To prove it, Alim takes them to Cappadocia, Turkey, where Zeynep shows them her village. They learn that sharing food with neighbors is a tradition.

programme.title: Spring into Action
programme.desc: Inspired by a sleepover at a friend's place, Darwin and Newts build a trampoline prototype before building a larger trampoline.

programme.title: Fun with Pressure and Hydraulics
programme.desc: How come does a lift operate as a hydraulic system? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of pressure. Have hands-on fun by experimenting with leakages, and get to know Blaise Pascal, a polymath, who pioneered research into the hydrostatic principle.

programme.title: Mystery of the Reluctant Racer
programme.desc: Addison and Alex's record-setting soap box derby car seems like a shoe-in to win the annual race – until something or someone makes it mysteriously slow down to a crawl. Has it been sabotaged? Addison only has an hour till race time to solve the mystery!

programme.title: Critical Examination
programme.desc: Robyn and Nyatepe help transfer a sick lion into a mobile high-tech scanner unit for a critical examination. Josh and Molly are checking the competitors in a posh horse trial for signs of injury and illness. And Jamie and Bonte are helping with Leo's leg surgery.

programme.title: Flight of the Godwits
programme.desc: When Newts needs instructions on how to film the godwits migrating, but Darwin is stuck in the treehouse, they build a series of listening mirrors to keep in communication.

programme.title: Naomi's Birthday
programme.desc: Naomi's birthday is coming, and she's planned it all-including the pricey gift her friends must buy. To afford it, Albert writes homework, Carol babysits, Flippy dances, and Robbie... borrows from Naomi! But will the gift-and the party-be all she hoped for?

programme.title: Marvellous Medicine and First Aid
programme.desc: What's the best way to organise a first aid kit? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of medicine. Have hands-on fun by making a handy first aid kit, and get to know Al-Zahrawi, ‘the father of surgery' & inventor of a number of surgical instruments.

programme.title: Clownfish and White Tiger
programme.desc: We follow the aquarium team as they initiate their very own breeding program with the hope of finding many more clownfish to come. In the meantime, Lin Mao, the white tiger, has something wrong with his hip and the vets need to make a diagnosis.

programme.title: Spring into Action
programme.desc: Inspired by a sleepover at a friend's place, Darwin and Newts build a trampoline prototype before building a larger trampoline.

programme.title: The Maze
programme.desc: The Nektons find a mysterious underwater maze. When they enter it, they get trapped inside. And what's worse - they're not alone!

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Germany: No Protection Against Digital Harassment?
programme.desc: More and more women are speaking out about violence in relationships, and are demanding stricter laws, including for deep fakes. +++ Storms are wreaking ever more damage on Italy's coasts. There is often insufficient coastal protection.

programme.desc: Constant stimuli, digital distractions - how can we stay focused these days? Does talent, training, or technology help? Neuroscientists and mental coaches show how concentration works in the brain.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

E1 - South Australia
programme.desc: In the first part of the episode, Andy explores sustainable kingfish farming in Spencer Gulf, South Australia, visiting Clean Seas sea farm and preparing fresh kingfish sashimi with the team. Moving to Kangaroo Island, he learns pickling techniques with Kate from Kangaroo Island Source, showcasing her products in a Carne Asada Taco. The episode continues with Andy exploring d'Arenberg's multi-function building and 'The Cube,' experiencing a Chef's Table, and concludes at Wirra Wirra winery, where he cooks Yogurt Flatbread with Olive Oil and Dukka, enjoying it with the staff and their wines.

programme.title: E7 - Paint Your Red River Stagecoach at High Noon
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will test different famous shots from westerns. Can you shoot a cowboy hat off the bad guy? Will a shotgun blast really throw you back through a window? Can a single shot from a colt revolver break shackles? If you shoot dynamite, will it explode?

programme.title: E5 - Missing Home
programme.desc: Sarah visits the laundry district of Dhobi Ghat, one of the world's largest outdoor laundries. Further setbacks at the restaurant and the furious pace of Mumbai are beginning to wear Sarah down as the opening night gets closer.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: The students learn about life and death on the farm as baby crocodiles hatch in their hands and they have to kill an adult. Repeated fumbling in roping practice leaves John livid with everyone and Lyn’s frustration with diminutive Renee reaches boiling point.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Meet the mob of ‘street smart’ kangaroos moving into Australia’s capital city and the ecologists following their every move. Over one year we follow mob leader Black Spot and kangaroo mum Madge with her two young joeys – mischievous Sonny and tiny pouch bound Alice. After 15 years of drought, Canberra’s Eastern Grey Kangaroos know that the parks and gardens of Australia’s “bush capital” provide a reliable supply of the juicy grass but learning to be a street-smart urban ‘roo is tough with the kangaroos negotiating busy roads and avoiding cars and dogs. Inevitably their incursion into human habitat causes problems – damage to property and collisions with cars. It’s costing millions and thousands of animals are killed each year. The farmers complain that the ‘roos are eroding farmland and damaging their fences. The ACT Government holds an annual kangaroo cull to reduce animal numbers to “sustainable levels”. Confrontations make international news as the situation arouses passions and pol

programme.title: E2 - The Last Laugh
programme.desc: After years of getting the raw end of the deal with Scrappy Larry, Robin pulls a prank on his old buddy, but the fun and games end when Claudia’s buyer makes an unexpected request.

programme.title: E4 - Malmo
programme.desc: Jack is in the vegetarian capital of Northern Europe, Malmo, Sweden. Here, he shares his version of the Welsh Rarebit toastie and a Michelin star chef adds a Nordic twist.

programme.desc: Terry and Larry will test different famous shots from westerns. Can you shoot a cowboy hat off the bad guy? Will a shotgun blast really throw you back through a window? Can a single shot from a colt revolver break shackles? If you shoot dynamite, will it explode?

programme.desc: The students learn about life and death on the farm as baby crocodiles hatch in their hands and they have to kill an adult. Repeated fumbling in roping practice leaves John livid with everyone and Lyn’s frustration with diminutive Renee reaches boiling point.

programme.title: E6 - 樂山站開啟美食新戰線
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: E52
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E2 - 孟鶴堂代班秦霄賢上才藝
programme.desc: 由黃明昊、哈妮克孜、李宏毅、秦霄賢、趙小棠等嘉賓組成「探玩行動派」，以全新升級的劇情式玩法解鎖城市新風貌；他們將以最年輕、最活力的方式穿越各大城市，發揮創新的思維，創造出全新的有趣玩法。

programme.desc: Barbalala and the family life! / Barbabright and Barbabeau have designed a huge wooden toy powered by an engine using bio oil.

programme.title: E102 - The Barbamartians
programme.desc: While travelling to Mars, the Barbapapas meet a family of Barbamartians. They have no time to get acquainted when a giant plant attacks the village.

programme.title: E413 - Side-Swiped / Quest For The Blue Bananas
programme.desc: Dora and Boots run into Swiper and his nephew Zorrito! They must make it home before Swiper and Zorrito can swipe their teddy bear. // Dora meets Boots' cousin, Sombrera, and they journey across the rainforest to find the special blue bananas!

programme.title: E101 - Catch The Quickatoo / Lost Lorito
programme.desc: Abuela shows Dora her photo album of birds, with one page blank: the Quickatoo. Dora vows to find the Quickatoo and get a picture to complete the album. // Dora and Boots help a baby parrot named Lorito find his Mami, but he can't stop copying Boots!

programme.title: E124 - Barbazoo Can't Say ''no'' / The Doppelganger
programme.desc: Barbazoo is ready to help. But Barbabright and Barbabelle abuse his kindness and drive him crazy. // By chance, Barbazoo realizes he can imitate Barbapapa. He uses this opportunity to distribute chores to his brothers and sisters. Will they find out?

programme.title: E202 - Princess For A Day / Barbabeau's Adventure
programme.desc: Barbabelle proudly announces to her family that she wants to become a princess. // Barbabravo is moping with boredom, his brothers and sisters are all busy and no one wants to play with him.

programme.title: E164
programme.desc: “We Are One” uses a documentary shooting method, from the perspective of people, animals, and nature living in harmony, tells a touching story of cross-species, highlighting the noble sentiments of purity and kindness. As the sons of the earth, we are in harmony with nature, and all things coexist with love. From January 21, 2023, Phoenix Chinese Channel will launch a weekly documentary program of human and animals “We Are One” with a total duration of 26 minutes.

programme.title: E3 - Sad Cypress (Part 1)
programme.desc: Elinor Carlisle seems to be the obvious murderer of her ailing aunt and the beautiful romantic rival who broke up her engagement, but Poirot uncovers darker motives.

programme.desc: A flash fire demolishes the second floor of the Walton's home and starts a series of events that threatens to destroy the family.

programme.title: 10 Things You Don't Know About Singapore
programme.desc: 10 Things You Don't Know About Singapore reveals intriguing details about this tiny country that even most locals wouldn't know! It uncovers new twists behind historical tales, figures and places.

programme.title: E20 - Wonders Of The Ancient World
programme.desc: Remarkable feats of engineering from our ancient past span the globe. Some are amazing in size. Others in sophistication. Some are so strange they border on inexplicable.

programme.title: Pyare Mohan
programme.desc: Pyare and Mohan, two friends with visual and hearing disabilities respectively, fall in love with Preeti and Priya. When the women are charged with murder, the two try to save them.

programme.title: Deewana Main Deewana
programme.desc: Basant always gets what he wants and when he falls in love with Priya at first sight, he wants her to be his. Later, he impersonates his friend Vasant, who had saved her life before, to win her over.

programme.desc: Pyare and Mohan, two friends with visual and hearing disabilities respectively, fall in love with Preeti and Priya. When the women are charged with murder, the two try to save them.

programme.title: Virus
programme.desc: The world is under attack from an “Love virus”? Taek-seon is a translator who always feels tired, unmotivated and uninterested in romance. One day, Taek-seon has a disastrous blind date with Su-pil, a born single medical researcher who proposes on their first meeting. After the date they met, the world is suddenly enveloped in atmosphere of love... Taek-seon found herself laughing for no reason and searching for a beautiful dress, everything looks cute, even a daily promotional text from her old classmate Yeon-woo. However, Taek-seon knew that she had been infected with 100% fatality rate deadly virus -- Toxo Virus. She meets Dr. Lee Gyun, the only researcher who can create the antiviral medicine and she realizes that all these romantic feelings are symptoms of virus. Thus, her unexpected journey begins...

programme.title: Manhole
programme.desc: Shunsuke Kawamura worked in a real estate company and was always the best of the best when it came to sales. He was going to marry the daughter of the CEO of his company, but then, something unexpected happened...Just before the day of his wedding, he attended a surprise party held by his colleagues and got drunk. On his way home, he accidentally fell into a deep manhole. By the time he woke up, it was already midnight. What was even worse was that his right leg was heavily injured and he could neither contact the police nor find out his current location using GPS. The only person he could contact was his ex-girlfriend, but she did not believe in his words. He started to believe that he might have been set up by someone, so he decided to set up a new Twitter account named “Manhole Girl”, hoping that with the help of the internet, he could locate himself and call out for help. Netizens excitedly assisted him to search for the suspect.

programme.title: Thunderstruck Cop
programme.desc: One day, Hyun-joon, a policeman who lives with his mother and his daughter, attains a superpower after getting struck by the lightning. After the incident, Hyun-joon realizes that there are others who have been going through the same situation with him, and gets involved with unexpected situations. Will he be able to succeed both, as a father who struggles with the relationship with his daughter, and as a cop with a superpower who is eager to catch an evil criminal?

programme.desc: During the early reign of Republic of China, Cheng Fong Tin conducted speculative business in the Northeast frontier. Chinese Government sent secret agent Laifu to pursue him. The first train carried many high officials and noble lords including a Japanese envoy with the national treasure. It drew the attention of Shanghai triads colluding with gangsters to plunder the treasure. The train was forced to stop at Hanshui town due to the railroad was exploded by Cheng...
